summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of TUB platform visual updates. All visual changes implemented correctly including new logo, background images, and gradient overlays. Navigation and functionality working perfectly.
passed_tests: Header logo loads correctly from play-lh.googleusercontent.com with id='logoimg' and h-12 class
Acertos card shows correct background image from tub.pt/uploads/1/30/601/images/TUB20200717_014.jpg
Trocas card shows correct background image from correiodominho.pt/images/139971_800x800.jpg
Faltas card shows correct background image from correiodominho.pt/images/137615_800x800.jpg
Card text legible with proper gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-t from-black/70)
All 3 cards clickable and navigate to correct pages (/acertos, /trocas, /faltas)
Acertos analytics page loads with KPIs and Power BI iframe
Footer renders correctly with proper content
Mobile responsiveness excellent - logo, menu, cards, stats all work properly
Mobile menu toggle and navigation functionality working
